prompt:
I'm planning Travel in Pride content for Pride Month week (June 16-22, 2026). Here are 2 posts I want to schedule:

Post 1: 'Best LGBTQ+ Pride Events Happening This June' - this is going on YouTube Shorts, Pinterest, and LinkedIn. It's a curated list of 5 must-visit Pride events globally.

Post 2: 'Circuit Party Season Alert - 2026 Events You Can't Miss' - this goes on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Reddit. It's about upcoming circuit events.

For Post 2, I want a voiceover script too in an energetic/hype tone. All content is Travel in Pride brand. The goal for Post 1 is community engagement and for Post 2 is to drive awareness and community engagement.

Write all captions and the voiceover script.

assertions.name: YouTube Shorts caption has SEO-optimized title and description
assertions.description: Title should be 60 chars max, keyword-rich; description should have primary keyword in first sentence

assertions.name: Pinterest caption is keyword-rich without emoji overload
assertions.description: Pin title 75-100 chars, description 150-300 chars with natural keywords, no exclamation spam

assertions.name: LinkedIn caption opens with bold hook sentence
assertions.description: First line should be a compelling statement or question with no preamble

assertions.name: TikTok caption has conversational hook before truncation
assertions.description: Hook must be in first line, visible before ~150 char truncation

assertions.name: Reddit caption has zero self-promo tone
assertions.description: Reddit community-first, genuine value-led, OutAtlas mention only if naturally relevant

assertions.name: Voiceover script is complete and ready to record
assertions.description: Full word-for-word script with delivery notes, emphasis points, pause markers

assertions.name: Voiceover script matches energetic/hype tone
assertions.description: Script should use CAPS for emphasis, exclamation energy, build-and-release pacing

assertions.name: All 6 captions maintain Travel in Pride brand voice
assertions.description: Community-first, celebratory, inclusive tone across all platforms
